text:
Market today: The mood is cautious with growing concerns over AI spending, which directly impacts your heavily concentrated tech/chip portfolio. The real driver for your names today is this sentiment, despite a large capital raise by SK Hynix in the chip sector.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -24.38% and below its default stop. SPAL, a brand-new leveraged ETF, is also in trouble, down -20.64% and below its stop. Remember, trading on margin amplifies these drops significantly.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further news regarding AI spending trends. Also, monitor SOXL and SPAL's price action around their stops very carefully.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged, underperforming positions before considering any new plays.
plays: Trim SOXL: It's down -24.38% and below its 200 stop. Respect the stop or adjust to exit this leveraged position.
Trim SPAL: This new leveraged ETF is down -20.64% and below its 21.38 stop. Cut losses to protect capital.
No new buys today - hold and watch: Market mood around AI spending suggests caution. Focus on risk management.
